---
title: Talks
listing:
  - id: talks
    contents:
    - talks.yml
    sort:
    - "date desc"
    date-format: "MMM YYYY"
    template: ../html/talks.ejs
---

::: {.hidden}
load fontawesome {{< fa link >}}
:::

::: {.callout-note}
The slides for many of the talks are missing, but I am trying to find and link them.
If you need slides for a talk, please [email me](mailto:me@vikraman.org).
:::
